member.name: T:HazinaStore.Core.Chat
member.summary: Represents a single chat conversation Provides access to messages, uploads, and chat metadata

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Core.Chat.LastUpdated
member.summary: When the chat was last updated

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Core.Chat.IsPinned
member.summary: Whether the chat is pinned to the top

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Chat.GetMessages
member.summary: Get all messages in this chat

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Chat.AddMessage(HazinaStore.Core.Models.ChatMessage)
member.summary: Add a message to the chat

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Chat.AddUserMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Add a user message to the chat

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Chat.AddAssistantMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Add an assistant message to the chat

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Chat.UpdateMessage(System.Int32,HazinaStore.Core.Models.ChatMessage)
member.summary: Update a message at a specific index

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Chat.DeleteMessage(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a message at a specific index

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Chat.ClearMessages
member.summary: Delete all messages in the chat

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Chat.UploadFile(System.String,System.Byte[],System.Boolean)
member.summary: Upload a file to this chat
member.param: Whether to include in project embeddings

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Chat.GetUploadedFiles
member.summary: Get list of uploaded files in this chat

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Chat.GetUploadedFilePath(System.String)
member.summary: Get path to an uploaded file
member.returns: Full path to file or null if not found

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Chat.Pin
member.summary: Pin this chat to the top

member.name: T:HazinaStore.Core.ChatRepository
member.summary: Manages all chats within a project Handles chat metadata, messages, and uploads

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ChatRepository.#ctor(System.String,HazinaStore.Core.Project)
member.summary: Initialize chat repository for a project

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ChatRepository.CreateChat(System.String)
member.param: Optional chat name (auto-generated if not provided)

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ChatRepository.GetChat(System.String)
member.summary: Get a specific chat by ID
member.returns: Chat instance or null if not found

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ChatRepository.PinChat(System.String)
member.summary: Pin a chat to the top

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ChatRepository.GetChatMessagesFile(System.String)
member.summary: Get path to chat messages file

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ChatRepository.GetChatsMetadataFilePath
member.summary: Get path to chats metadata file

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ChatRepository.GetAllChatsMetadata
member.summary: Load all chats metadata from disk

member.name: T:HazinaStore.Core.DocumentRepository
member.summary: Manages all documents within a project Handles both uploaded documents and generated documents

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.DocumentRepository.#ctor(System.String,HazinaStore.Core.Project)
member.summary: Initialize document repository for a project

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.DocumentRepository.UploadDocument(System.String,System.Byte[],System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Upload a document to the project
member.param: Extracted text content (for PDFs, images, etc.)

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.DocumentRepository.DetermineTags(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Determine appropriate tags for a document based on type and source

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.DocumentRepository.GetUploadedDocuments
member.summary: Get all uploaded documents metadata NOTE: During transition, this returns empty list Use the legacy GetUploadedFiles() for actual file list

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.DocumentRepository.GetUploadedDocument(System.String)
member.summary: Get a specific uploaded document by ID
member.returns: Uploaded document or null if not found

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.DocumentRepository.GetUploadedDocumentsMetadata
member.summary: Read uploaded documents metadata from disk

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.DocumentRepository.SaveUploadedDocumentsMetadata(System.Collections.Generic.List{HazinaStore.Core.Models.UploadedDocument})
member.summary: Save uploaded documents metadata to disk

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.DocumentRepository.SaveFileWithRetry(System.String,System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Save file with retry logic to handle file locking issues Retries up to 3 times with 100ms delay between attempts

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.DocumentRepository.SaveGeneratedDocument(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create or update a generated document

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.DocumentRepository.GetGeneratedDocument(System.String)
member.summary: Get a generated document by name
member.returns: Generated document or null if not found

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.DocumentRepository.GetGeneratedDocuments
member.summary: Get all generated documents in the project

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.DocumentRepository.GeneratedDocumentExists(System.String)
member.summary: Check if a generated document exists

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.DocumentRepository.GetAllDocuments
member.summary: Get all documents (both uploaded and generated)

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.DocumentRepository.SearchDocuments(System.String)
member.summary: Search documents by content or name

member.name: T:HazinaStore.Core.GlobalChat
member.summary: Manages global chats that have access to all projects Global chats are stored in the .chats folder at the workspace level

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Core.GlobalChat.GlobalChatsPath
member.summary: Path to the global chats folder (.chats)

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.GlobalChat.GetChat(System.String)
member.summary: Get a specific global chat by ID
member.returns: Chat instance or null if not found

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.GlobalChat.GetAllChats
member.summary: Get metadata for all global chats

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.GlobalChat.GetAllProjectEmbeddingsFiles
member.summary: Get all project embeddings files (for RAG across all projects)
member.returns: List of paths to embeddings files

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.GlobalChat.GetChatMessagesFile(System.String)
member.summary: Get path to chat messages file

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.GlobalChat.GetChatsMetadataFilePath
member.summary: Get path to chats metadata file

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.GlobalChat.GetAllChatsMetadata
member.summary: Load all chats metadata from disk

member.name: T:HazinaStore.Core.GlobalChat.GlobalChatRepository
member.summary: Internal repository class for global chats Wraps ChatRepository functionality for global chats

member.name: T:HazinaStore.Core.Interfaces.IDocument
member.summary: Base interface for all documents in the system

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Core.Interfaces.IDocument.Content
member.summary: Full text content of the document

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Core.Interfaces.IDocument.Embedding
member.summary: Vector embedding for semantic search (nullable if not yet generated)

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Interfaces.IDocument.ToDescriptiveString
member.summary: Convert document to a descriptive string format for AI context

member.name: T:HazinaStore.Core.Models.ChatMessage
member.summary: Represents a single message in a chat conversation

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Core.Models.ChatMessage.Role
member.summary: Role of the message sender (user, assistant, system)

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Core.Models.ChatMessage.Timestamp
member.summary: Timestamp when the message was created

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Core.Models.ChatMessage.Metadata
member.summary: Optional metadata (e.g., file uploads, canvas edits)

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Core.Models.ProjectMetadata.ProjectType
member.summary: Type of project (customer, chat, global, etc.)

member.name: T:HazinaStore.Core.Models.UploadedDocument
member.summary: Represents a document uploaded by the user

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Core.Models.UploadedDocument.ExtractedText
member.summary: Text content extracted from the file (for PDFs, images, etc.)

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Core.Models.UploadedDocument.Tags
member.summary: Tags for categorizing and filtering documents Examples: "text", "image", "upload", "generated", "website", "webpage", "product"

member.name: T:HazinaStore.Core.Project
member.summary: Represents a single project - a folder with documents, chats, and settings Core entity that provides access to all project-related functionality

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Project.#ctor(System.String,HazinaStore.Core.Workspace)
member.summary: Initialize a project from its folder path

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Project.Pin
member.summary: Pin this project to the top

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Project.GetEmbeddingsFilePath
member.summary: Get embeddings file path for this project

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Project.HasEmbeddings
member.summary: Check if embeddings exist for this project

member.name: T:HazinaStore.Core.ProjectSettings
member.summary: Manages project-specific settings and configuration Handles custom prompts, action files, and WordPress settings

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ProjectSettings.GetCustomPrompt
member.returns: Custom prompt text or null if not set

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ProjectSettings.GetActionFiles
member.returns: Dictionary of action name to content

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ProjectSettings.GetActionFile(System.String)
member.summary: Get a specific action file content
member.returns: Action content or null if not found

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ProjectSettings.ActionFileExists(System.String)
member.summary: Check if an action file exists

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ProjectSettings.GetWordpressSettings
member.summary: Get WordPress settings for this project
member.returns: WordPress settings or null if not configured

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ProjectSettings.SaveWordpressSettings(Hazina.Tools.Models.WordpressSettings)
member.summary: Save WordPress settings for this project

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ProjectSettings.GetPromptFiles
member.summary: Get all prompt files in the project
member.returns: Dictionary of prompt file name to content

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ProjectSettings.GetPromptFile(System.String)
member.summary: Get a specific prompt file content
member.returns: Prompt content or null if not found

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ProjectSettings.GetContentHooks
member.returns: Content hooks JSON or null if not found

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ProjectSettings.GetBlogCategories
member.returns: Blog categories JSON or null if not found

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ProjectSettings.GetContentPlanning
member.returns: Content planning JSON or null if not found

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.ProjectSettings.GetProjectFile(System.String)
member.returns: File content or null if not found

member.name: T:HazinaStore.Core.Workspace
member.summary: Represents the entire workspace - the projects folder Entry point for accessing all projects, global chats, and workspace settings

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Core.Workspace.BasePath
member.summary: Path to the projects folder (workspace root)

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Workspace.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initialize a workspace from the projects folder path

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Workspace.GetProject(System.String)
member.summary: Get a specific project by ID (folder name)

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Workspace.GetAllProjects(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get all projects, optionally including archived ones

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Workspace.CreateProject(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.param: Unique project identifier (will be folder name)

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Workspace.DeleteProject(System.String)
member.summary: Delete a project (archives it instead of hard delete)

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Workspace.GetGlobalChat
member.summary: Get the global chat system (chats accessible across all projects)

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.Workspace.SearchProjects(System.String)
member.summary: Search for projects by name or description

member.name: T:HazinaStore.Core.WorkspaceSettings
member.summary: Manages workspace-wide settings and configuration Handles prompts, conversation starters, and other global settings

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.WorkspaceSettings.GetRolePrompt(System.String)
member.returns: Prompt text or null if not found

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.WorkspaceSettings.GetCustomSetting(System.String)
member.summary: Get a custom setting file content
member.returns: File content or null if not found

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Core.WorkspaceSettings.CustomSettingExists(System.String)
member.summary: Check if a custom setting file exists

member.name: T:HazinaStore.Models.SqliteSettings
member.summary: Configuration settings for SQLite storage backend. SQLite provides single-file database storage ideal for local development and embedded scenarios.

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.SqliteSettings.Enabled
member.summary: Enable SQLite storage backend. When true, SQLite will be used instead of file-based storage.

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.SqliteSettings.DatabasePath
member.summary: Path to the SQLite database file. If relative, resolved from project folder. Default: "./hazina.db" in project folder.

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.SqliteSettings.ConnectionString
member.summary: Connection string for SQLite. If not provided, auto-generated from DatabasePath. Example: "Data Source=C:\path\to\hazina.db;Mode=ReadWriteCreate"

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.SqliteSettings.EmbeddingsOptional
member.summary: Whether embeddings are optional (metadata-first mode). When true, the system works without generating/storing embeddings. Useful for cost savings or pure keyword/metadata search.

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Models.SqliteSettings.GetConnectionString(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the connection string, using provided value or auto-generating from database path.

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Models.SqliteSettings.Validate
member.summary: Validates the settings and throws if invalid.

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.SupabaseSettings.AnonKey
member.summary: Supabase anonymous key (public key for client-side use)

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.SupabaseSettings.ServiceRoleKey
member.summary: Supabase service role key (server-side key with elevated permissions) Use this for administrative operations

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.SupabaseSettings.Enabled
member.summary: Whether to use Supabase as the primary database (defaults to false for optional integration)

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.SupabaseSettings.ConnectionString
member.summary: Database connection string (for direct PostgreSQL access via Npgsql) Format: Host=db.your-project.supabase.co;Port=5432;Database=postgres;Username=postgres;Password=your-password

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.SupabaseSettings.UseSupabaseStorage
member.summary: Whether to use Supabase Storage for file uploads (defaults to false)

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.SupabaseSettings.DefaultBucket
member.summary: Default bucket name for Supabase Storage

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.SupabaseSettings.UseSupabaseAuth
member.summary: Whether to use Supabase Auth for authentication (defaults to false)

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Models.SupabaseSettings.IsValid
member.summary: Validates that required settings are configured

member.name: M:HazinaStore.Models.SupabaseSettings.GetConnectionString
member.summary: Gets the connection string with fallback to environment variable

member.name: P:ConversationMessage.MessageType
member.summary: Type of message (Text, GuidanceQuestion, InputGuidance, SystemStatus, Artifact, SideEffect)

member.name: P:ConversationMessage.UserIntent
member.summary: Classified user intent (Query, Command, Feedback, Clarification)

member.name: P:ConversationMessage.Guidance
member.summary: Guidance data for interactive components (stored as JSON)

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Core.Services.HazinaServiceBase`1
member.summary: Abstract base class for all Hazina services. Provides common functionality for configuration, logging, and error handling. Reduces boilerplate code across 30+ service implementations.
member.typeparam: The concrete service type (for typed logging).

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Core.Services.HazinaServiceBase`1.ServiceName
member.summary: Gets the service name for logging purposes.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Core.Services.HazinaServiceBase`1.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{`0})
member.summary: Creates a new service instance with configuration and logging.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Core.Services.HazinaServiceBase`1.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Creates a new service instance with configuration only (logger is optional).

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Core.Services.HazinaServiceBase`1.GetConfigValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a configuration value from the specified section and key.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Core.Services.HazinaServiceBase`1.GetRequiredConfigValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a required configuration value, throwing if not found.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Core.Services.HazinaServiceBase`1.LogError(System.Exception,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Logs an error message with exception.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Core.Services.HazinaServiceBase`1.ExecuteAsync``1(System.String,System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}})
member.summary: Executes an async operation with standardized error handling and logging.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Core.Services.HazinaServiceBase`1.ExecuteAsync(System.String,System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Executes an async operation with standardized error handling and logging (no return value).

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Core.Services.HazinaServiceBase`1.ExecuteWithRetryAsync``1(System.String,System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Executes an async operation with retry logic.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Core.Services.HazinaServiceBase
member.summary: Abstract base class for services that don't need typed logging.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Core.Services.HazinaServiceBase.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Creates a new service instance with configuration.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Core.Services.HazinaServiceBase.GetConfigValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a configuration value from the specified section and key.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Core.Services.HazinaServiceBase.GetRequiredConfigValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a required configuration value, throwing if not found.
